overall.description: A static first-person view of a medieval fantasy tavern interior rendered in a game engine. The scene features warm lighting from a chandelier and fireplace, wooden architecture, and a single NPC character standing by the fire. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, capturing the atmospheric interior details.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern common room with fireplace and dining tables

entered.detail: wrought iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling beams
large stone fireplace with active burning fire and mantle
wooden dining table with chairs arranged around it
round metal serving platter resting on a wooden surface

framed landscape painting hanging on the wooden wall

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cozy medieval tavern interior illuminated by warm artificial lighting from an overhead chandelier and a burning fireplace. The space features traditional wooden architecture with exposed beams, dining furniture, and decorative elements. A single NPC stands motionless near the fireplace in the background while the camera maintains a fixed first-person perspective throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, unchanging gaze upon a cozy medieval tavern interior bathed in warm, atmospheric light. It begins with a fixed first-person perspective of the room, where the glow from an overhead chandelier and a burning fireplace illuminates the traditional wooden architecture and exposed beams. As the view lingers, the focus remains on the stillness of the dining furniture and decorative elements that fill the space. The scene persists in this quiet state, holding a steady frame on a single NPC standing motionless near the fireplace in the background.
